title: Swiss parliament lifts ban on new nuclear power plants
author: leonidasrup
aiHeadline: Swiss parliament decides to lift ban on new nuclear power plants because clearly, they've exhausted all other options for catastrophic decisions.

title: I found 10k GitHub repositories distributing Trojan malware
author: theorchid
aiHeadline: 10,000 GitHub repositories are distributing Trojan malware, proving that the internet is still the wild west, but with code instead of six-shooters.

title: Microsoft new Outlook takes 10 seconds to do what Outlook Classic does instantly
author: Adam-Hincu
aiHeadline: Microsoft's new Outlook takes 10 seconds to do what Outlook Classic did instantly, because who doesn't love waiting for their email to load like it's 1998.

title: DeepSeek Introduces Vision
author: RIshabh235
aiHeadline: DeepSeek introduces Vision, the latest in AI that will undoubtedly solve all your problems except the ones it creates.

title: Emacs 31 is around the corner: The changes I'm daily driving
author: frou_dh
aiHeadline: Emacs 31 is almost here, bringing you the latest in text editing with all the features you didn't know you needed, but now you can't live without.
